summary: Smart Stop Service (P2 feature) - All 30 backend API tests passed. All 4 endpoints working: GET /modes, GET /compare, GET /recommend/{symbol}, POST /calculate. Business logic verified: anti-hunt mode provides deepest protection, layered mode returns 3 stops with position percentages, volatility-adjusted mode widens stops in high volatility.

features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/modes: PASS - Returns 6 modes with id, name, description, hunt_risk, best_for
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/compare: PASS - Compares all 6 modes, returns ranked_by_protection
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/recommend/{symbol}: PASS - Returns recommendation based on float, volume, volatility, time_of_day
features_verified.POST /api/smart-stops/calculate: PASS - Calculates stop with all 6 modes, enforces 2-8% distance constraints
features_verified.anti_hunt_deepest_protection: PASS - Anti-hunt stop (93.25) is lowest/deepest compared to original (97.25) for longs
features_verified.layered_mode_returns_layers: PASS - Returns layered_stops array with 3 levels (40%/30%/30%)
features_verified.volatility_adjusted_widens_high_vol: PASS - High vol buffer (6.25) > normal vol buffer (3.75)
features_verified.low_float_recommends_anti_hunt: PASS - Float <10M shares gets anti_hunt recommendation
features_verified.low_volume_recommends_anti_hunt: PASS - Avg volume <500K gets anti_hunt recommendation
features_verified.high_volatility_recommends_vol_adjusted: PASS - High volatility regime gets volatility_adjusted
features_verified.chandelier_mode_from_high: PASS - Uses 3x ATR from swing high for trailing stop

critical_code_review_comments: SmartStopService correctly implements 6 distinct stop modes with proper business logic
Anti-hunt mode correctly places stops BEYOND obvious levels (support, round numbers) with 1.5x ATR buffer
Layered stops correctly split position 40/30/30 at progressively deeper ATR depths (1.0/1.5/2.0)
Volatility multipliers correctly scale: low=1.0x, normal=1.5x, high=2.5x, extreme=3.0x
Min/max stop distance constraints (2-8%) properly enforced
Round number avoidance implemented with 0.2% buffer
Frontend SmartStopSelector component correctly uses all API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Stop Service at /app/backend/services/smart_stop_service.py fully tested. All 6 stop modes (original, atr_dynamic, anti_hunt, volatility_adjusted, layered, chandelier) working correctly. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_smart_stop_service.py covers all endpoints and business logic. Frontend component SmartStopSelector.jsx uses all APIs correctly.
